home.hero_desc: Discover our summer makeup collection with vibrant and long-lasting shades.

shop.hero_desc: Discover our curated collection of premium cosmetics selected by TMC experts.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.empty_desc: Head back to the shop or use the chatbot to get personalized product suggestions.
cart.quality_desc: All items in your cart are carefully curated. Each order includes a complimentary consultation.

checkout.page_desc: Review your shipping details, confirm your cart, and get ready for a secure payment with TMC.
checkout.shipping_desc: Provide accurate details so the TMC team can deliver quickly and support you better after purchase.
checkout.address_placeholder: 123 Le Loi, Ben Thanh Ward, District 1
checkout.payment_desc: The payment step will be available after your shipping details are completed.
checkout.cod_desc: You will pay directly to the delivery partner when the order arrives. TMC will confirm and prepare the order right after receiving it.
checkout.review_desc: Confirm products, quantities, and totals before placing the order.
checkout.promo_help: If you have a promo code, the system will validate it automatically when you place the order.
checkout.secure_note: Your payment information is encrypted securely. TMC does not store card data directly on the system.
checkout.empty_desc: Your cart is currently empty. Head back to the shop or ask the chatbot for tailored product suggestions before checking out.
checkout.stock_error: Product '{{name}}' is out of stock ({{stock}} left, you ordered {{quantity}})

blog.label: Beauty News & Science
blog.title: The TMC Editorial
blog.description: Expert perspectives on cosmetics, skincare and the latest beauty trends.
blog.newsletter_title: Stay at the Forefront of Beauty
blog.newsletter_desc: Join 10,000+ subscribers for weekly beauty and skincare insights.

about.label: Our Philosophy
about.title: Precision in Science, Elegance in Care.
about.description: At TMC Vietnam, we believe that true excellence lies at the intersection of rigorous standards and restorative beauty.
about.safety_desc: Our facility adheres to the most stringent international hygiene standards.
about.cert_desc: Accredited by international dermatological and beauty organizations.
about.team_desc: Our team of world-class specialists brings decades of collective experience.
about.env_desc: Every corner has been architecturally designed to promote well-being.
about.cta_desc: Schedule a comprehensive consultation with our specialists.

signin.hero_desc: Experience premium cosmetics met with dedicated customer care.
signin.welcome_desc: Access your account and order history.

authPage.hero_desc: Access orders, products, customers and content management through a modern, focused experience.
authPage.hero_sub: Access orders, products, customers and content management
authPage.login_desc: Sign in to continue shopping or access the admin area if your account has admin permission.
authPage.register_desc: Create an account to shop and track orders more easily.

faq.label: SUPPORT CENTER
faq.title: How can we help you?
faq.still_questions_desc: Our customer care team is available 24/7 to assist you.
faq.newsletter_desc: Join 10,000+ subscribers for weekly beauty and skincare insights.

footer.description: TMC Vietnam brings premium international cosmetics in a curated experience designed for you.
footer.newsletter_desc: Join our circle for exclusive beauty insights and deals.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: TMC is always ready to listen and support your beauty journey.

product.not_found_desc: This item may have been hidden, discontinued, or the link you opened is no longer valid.
product.description_fallback: This product does not have a detailed description yet. Please contact TMC for more guidance.
product.wholesale_note: Wholesale pricing is activated once your account reaches the spending tiers configured by the admin.
product.related_desc: A few items from the same category that TMC customers often choose together.
product.highlight_authentic_desc: Products are carefully curated and reviewed before appearing on TMC.
product.highlight_shipping_desc: Carefully packed with clear order tracking and full after-sales support.
product.highlight_support_desc: Ask directly about skin type, benefits, and the best matching categories right on the website.

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage orders and notifications
account.desc: Track order status, view purchase history and get realtime notifications when admin updates your orders.
account.support_desc: All order status changes will be sent to your notifications here.
account.cancel_order_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?

chatbot.title: Product Advice with DeepSeek
chatbot.subtitle: AI Concierge
chatbot.desc: Suggestions based on your skin needs, budget, and care goals — sourced from our real product database.
chatbot.greeting: Hi, I am TMC Beauty Concierge. I can recommend products based on your skin type, budget, and skincare goals.
chatbot.placeholder: Describe your needs, e.g. oily acne-prone skin, need serum under 500k...
chatbot.prompt_3: I want a skincare combo under 1M VND
chatbot.busy: The chatbot is currently unavailable or no active API key found. Please try again later.

combos.hero_desc: Curated beauty sets at exclusive prices. Buying combos always saves more than individual purchases.
combos.empty_desc: Check back later to discover special offers.

article.blog_title: Articles and categories are fetched directly from the database.
article.blog_desc: Admin can add, edit, remove blog categories and articles from the admin panel — the frontend updates accordingly.
